command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
BASE='/home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub'

echo '=== handle_n8n and submit in core.py ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "grep -n 'def handle_n8n\|def submit\|def _spawn_runner\|daemon\|Popen\|subprocess.Popen\|DEVNULL\|_run\|setsid\|os.fork' $BASE/core.py | head -30" 2>&1

echo '=== DelegationRunner.run method ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "grep -n 'class DelegationRunner\|def run\|def _run_preflight\|def _run_plan\|log_path\|log_file\|runner.log' $BASE/core.py | head -30" 2>&1

echo '=== Lines around _spawn_runner or Popen ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "grep -n 'Popen\|spawn\|_run\|DEVNULL\|log_path' $BASE/core.py | head -20" 2>&1

echo DONE_1945
